text.title: Workflow Design Phase Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the workflow-design-phase methodology end-to-end.

step.name: check-spec-accepted
step.action: Read frontmatter; verify `status: Accepted`. Read all FR-X / NFR-X entries.
step.decision-gate: If not Accepted, emit skip-record citing r1-spec-accepted and STOP.

step.name: survey-codebase
step.action: Grep/Glob for related implementations; Read ≥3 existing patterns; capture path + line ranges.
step.decision-gate: If <3 patterns found, document why; do not fabricate.

step.name: draft-ad-x
step.action: For each architectural choice: enumerate ≥2 options, mark one chosen + reasons, capture rationale + trade-off + which FR/NFR it satisfies.
step.output: AD-X array; each entry has chosen + ≥1 rejected + rationale + satisfies.
step.decision-gate: If any AD has empty rejected list, BLOCK and retry.

step.name: file-table
step.action: For each AD: enumerate files touched as {CREATE, MODIFY, DELETE} + concrete path + one-sentence scope.
step.output: Concrete file_table; run `scripts/find-shared-files.py` to detect implicit deps.

step.name: data-and-api
step.action: Draft data models (table schemas, ORM models, JSON shapes) + API contracts (paths, methods, request/response shapes).

step.name: testing-strategy
step.action: For each AD: which test type covers it (unit / integration / e2e / contract). Cite repo testing convention.

step.name: fr-coverage-and-review
step.action: Compute fr_coverage map; reviewer pass for cross-AD consistency.
step.decision-gate: If any FR-X has no AD trace, BLOCK promotion to Accepted.
